name: Tortellini and Spinach Stew
recipeIngredient: Chicken broth - 1 cup (or beef or vegetable)
Fresh basil - 2 tbsp minced (or 1 tsp dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini according to package directions.
2. Remove stems from spinach leaves and set aside.
3. Seed and chop tomatoes and set aside.
4. Heat oil in a large deep skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add broth and boil gently, uncovered, for 5 minutes.
7. Add spinach, chopped tomatoes, and basil; stir until spinach wilts.
8. Drain tortellini and add to the skillet.
9. Cook for 1 minute or until hot.
10. Sprinkle with cheese and serve with pepper.
